scripts.check:pages-build: vite build --base=/monocrome-eclips/ && node scripts/prune-optimized-pngs.mjs && node scripts/check-dist-budget.mjs && node scripts/check-pages-base.mjs
scripts.check: npm run check:text-integrity && npm run typecheck && npm run validate:passives && npm run check:release-assets && npm run build && npm run check:dist
scripts.release:check: npm run check:asset-tooling && npm run optimize:assets && npm run security:audit && npm run check
scripts.prototype:check: npm run release:check && npm run check:prototype-readiness
